title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0787
summary: Wahengbam Joykumar Singh, an RTI activist and advocate, was accused of advising co-accused Ayekpam Keshorjit Singh to carry a licensed firearm and 'teach a lesson' to a government officer who obstructed their alleged extortion activities. The officer was subsequently shot dead by co-accused.
